import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np
import csv

# ── Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
rows = []
with open("data_analysis.csv", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    for r in reader:
        rows.append(r)

def flt(v):
    try: return float(v)
    except: return None

names       = [r["model_name"] for r in rows]
years       = [int(r["year"]) for r in rows]
categories  = [r["category"] for r in rows]
params      = [flt(r["params_B"]) for r in rows]
train_hrs   = [flt(r["training_hours"]) for r in rows]
tasks       = [flt(r["tasks_supported"]) for r in rows]
wer         = [flt(r["asr_wer_librispeech_clean"]) for r in rows]
zero_shot   = [r["zero_shot"] for r in rows]
multilingual= [r["multilingual"] for r in rows]

# unique categories + colour map
cat_set = list(dict.fromkeys(categories))
palette = plt.cm.tab10(np.linspace(0, 0.9, len(cat_set)))
cat_color = {c: palette[i] for i, c in enumerate(cat_set)}
colors = [cat_color[c] for c in categories]

# ── Figure layout ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20, 18))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("#0f1117")
gs = gridspec.GridSpec(3, 2, figure=fig, hspace=0.48, wspace=0.35)

TITLE_FS = 11
LABEL_FS = 9
TICK_FS  = 8

def style_ax(ax, title):
    ax.set_facecolor("#1a1d27")
    ax.set_title(title, color="white", fontsize=TITLE_FS, fontweight="bold", pad=8)
    ax.tick_params(colors="white", labelsize=TICK_FS)
    for spine in ax.spines.values():
        spine.set_edgecolor("#444")
    ax.xaxis.label.set_color("white")
    ax.yaxis.label.set_color("white")

# ── 1. Timeline: models by year + category ─────────────────────────────────────
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])   # full-width top row
cat_y = {c: i for i, c in enumerate(cat_set)}
for i, (name, year, cat) in enumerate(zip(names, years, categories)):
    y = cat_y[cat]
    ax1.scatter(year, y, s=180, color=cat_color[cat], zorder=4, edgecolors="white", linewidths=0.5)
    ax1.annotate(name, (year, y), textcoords="offset points", xytext=(0, 10),
                 ha="center", fontsize=7.5, color="white", rotation=25)
ax1.set_yticks(range(len(cat_set)))
ax1.set_yticklabels(cat_set, fontsize=TICK_FS)
ax1.set_xlabel("Year", fontsize=LABEL_FS)
ax1.set_xlim(2019.5, 2025.8)
ax1.grid(axis="x", linestyle="--", alpha=0.3, color="#555")
style_ax(ax1, "Timeline of Speech Foundation Models by Category (2020–2025)")

# ── 2. Parameter scale (log) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
valid_p = [(n, p, c) for n, p, c in zip(names, params, colors) if p is not None]
ns, ps, cs = zip(*valid_p)
y_pos = np.arange(len(ns))
bars = ax2.barh(y_pos, ps, color=cs, edgecolor="#333", linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_xscale("log")
ax2.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax2.set_yticklabels(ns, fontsize=7.5)
ax2.set_xlabel("Parameters (B, log scale)", fontsize=LABEL_FS)
ax2.axvline(1, color="#aaa", linestyle="--", linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.6)
ax2.text(1.05, len(ns)-0.5, "1B", color="#aaa", fontsize=7)
ax2.grid(axis="x", linestyle="--", alpha=0.2, color="#555")
style_ax(ax2, "Model Scale (Parameters)")

# ── 3. Training data (log) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
valid_t = [(n, h, c) for n, h, c in zip(names, train_hrs, colors) if h is not None]
nt, ht, ct = zip(*valid_t)
y_pos3 = np.arange(len(nt))
ax3.barh(y_pos3, ht, color=ct, edgecolor="#333", linewidth=0.5)
ax3.set_xscale("log")
ax3.set_yticks(y_pos3)
ax3.set_yticklabels(nt, fontsize=7.5)
ax3.set_xlabel("Training Audio (hours, log scale)", fontsize=LABEL_FS)
ax3.grid(axis="x", linestyle="--", alpha=0.2, color="#555")
style_ax(ax3, "Training Data Volume")

# ── 4. ASR WER on LibriSpeech-clean ───────────────────────────────────────────
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 0])
valid_w = [(n, w, c) for n, w, c in zip(names, wer, colors) if w is not None]
nw, wv, cw = zip(*valid_w)
y_pos4 = np.arange(len(nw))
hbars = ax4.barh(y_pos4, wv, color=cw, edgecolor="#333", linewidth=0.5)
ax4.axvline(2.3, color="#ff6b6b", linestyle="--", linewidth=1.2)
ax4.text(2.35, len(nw)-0.5, "Human\n~2.3%", color="#ff6b6b", fontsize=7.5)
ax4.set_yticks(y_pos4)
ax4.set_yticklabels(nw, fontsize=8)
ax4.set_xlabel("WER % (lower = better)", fontsize=LABEL_FS)
for bar, val in zip(hbars, wv):
    ax4.text(val + 0.03, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,
             f"{val:.1f}%", va="center", color="white", fontsize=7.5)
ax4.grid(axis="x", linestyle="--", alpha=0.2, color="#555")
style_ax(ax4, "ASR Performance — LibriSpeech test-clean WER")

# ── 5. Zero-shot & multilingual capability heat-map ───────────────────────────
ax5 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 1])
cap_names  = [n for n in names]
zs_vals    = [1 if z == "Yes" else 0 for z in zero_shot]
ml_vals    = [1 if m == "Yes" else 0 for m in multilingual]
matrix     = np.array([zs_vals, ml_vals])

im = ax5.imshow(matrix, aspect="auto", cmap="YlOrRd", vmin=0, vmax=1)
ax5.set_xticks(range(len(cap_names)))
ax5.set_xticklabels(cap_names, rotation=45, ha="right", fontsize=7)
ax5.set_yticks([0, 1])
ax5.set_yticklabels(["Zero-Shot", "Multilingual"], fontsize=LABEL_FS)
for i in range(2):
    for j in range(len(cap_names)):
        val = matrix[i, j]
        ax5.text(j, i, "✓" if val else "✗", ha="center", va="center",
                 fontsize=10, color="black" if val else "#aaa")
ax5.set_title("Zero-Shot & Multilingual Capability Matrix", color="white",
              fontsize=TITLE_FS, fontweight="bold", pad=8)
ax5.tick_params(colors="white", labelsize=TICK_FS)
for spine in ax5.spines.values():
    spine.set_edgecolor("#444")

# ── Legend ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
legend_patches = [mpatches.Patch(color=cat_color[c], label=c) for c in cat_set]
fig.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc="lower center", ncol=4,
           frameon=True, framealpha=0.2, fontsize=8.5,
           labelcolor="white", facecolor="#1a1d27", edgecolor="#555",
           bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, 0.01))

# ── Super-title ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig.suptitle("Speech Foundation Models — Landscape Analysis (2020–2025)",
             color="white", fontsize=16, fontweight="bold", y=0.98)

plt.savefig("visualization.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight",
            facecolor=fig.get_facecolor())
print("visualization.png saved.")
EOF
